import React from 'react'; import { Link, Navigate, useParams } from 'react-router-dom'; import { getServiceBySlug, processSteps } from '../data/servicePages'; import './ServiceDetail.css'; const ServiceDetail = () => { const { serviceSlug } = useParams(); const service = getServiceBySlug(serviceSlug); if (!service) { return ; } return (
{service.category}

{service.title}

{service.heroDescription}

Submit Your Query

The challenges

    {service.problems.map((item) => (
  • {item}
    • ))}

How we help

    {service.solutions.map((item) => (
  • {item}
    • ))}

What's included

    {service.included.map((item) => (
  • {item}
    • ))}

Who it's for

    {service.audience.map((item) => (
  • {item}
    • ))}

How the service works

{processSteps.map((step, index) => (
{index + 1}

{step.title}

{step.text}

))}

Ready to get started? Tell us what you need.

Submit Your Query
); }; export default ServiceDetail;
